updates.title: Welcome to Mission Control
updates.subtitle: Your guide to tracking every SpaceX launch
updates.summary: You've just joined thousands of space enthusiasts tracking every SpaceX launch in real time. Here's what you get for free and what's unlocked in Mission Control premium.
updates.author: Mission Control Team

updates.title: The Starship Program
updates.subtitle: An evolving flight test campaign
updates.summary: Starship is the largest and most powerful rocket ever flown. Each flight test pushes closer to the vehicle's full operational capability.
updates.author: Mission Control Team

updates.title: Your Mission Control Guide
updates.subtitle: Everything that's unlocked with premium
updates.summary: Live telemetry, integrated webcasts, pad weather, flight replays, and advanced notifications — here's how to get the most out of Mission Control.
updates.author: Mission Control Team
